evals.name: basic-setup
evals.prompt: I have an AstroDB database at .agents/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/astrodb-template.sqlite. I want to see the data in a web interface.
evals.expected_output: The model should clone the Astro-Web repository, verify the database schema using sqlite3, run the setup_website.py script with the discovered ra_deg and dec_deg columns, start the server, and verify the /browse endpoint using curl.
expectations: The output includes verification of the /browse endpoint using curl
The model clones the Astro-Web repository
The model runs setup_website.py with ra_deg and dec_deg

evals.name: custom-columns
evals.prompt: Please set up the AstroDB website for the database at .agents/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/astrodb-template.sqlite. I know the RA column is ra_deg and Dec is dec_deg. The primary table is Sources.
evals.expected_output: The model should clone the repository, run the setup_website.py script using the provided ra_deg, dec_deg, and Sources table arguments, start the server, and verify the /browse endpoint using curl.
expectations: The output includes verification of the /browse endpoint using curl
The model runs setup_website.py with provided ra_deg, dec_deg, and Sources

evals.name: custom-galaxies
evals.prompt: I have an AstroDB database at .agents/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/galaxies-db.sqlite and its configuration database.toml at .agents/skills/astrodb-website/evals/data/galaxy.toml. I want to see the data in a web interface. The primary sources table is called Galaxies, and the primary/foreign key columns should be called galaxy. Please set up the website for me.
evals.expected_output: The model should clone the Astro-Web repository, run setup_website.py with Galaxies as the primary table and discovered coordinate columns, configure the .env to use Galaxies and galaxy as the primary/foreign key column, start the server, and verify the /browse endpoint using curl.

assertions.text: Clones the Astro-Web repository to website/
Runs setup_website.py with Galaxies primary table and ra_deg/dec_deg coordinate columns
Configures website/.env to use Galaxies as the primary table, and galaxy as the primary/foreign key column
Runs the website server and verifies the browse endpoint using curl
